name: Dueling Wizards
author: Pookenstein
bootlegger: [Place 2 Wizard tokens in the bag. The Storyteller determines each Wizards' alignment after both have been drawn, and both learn their alignment at the start of Night 1.]

[One evil player and one good player is a Wizard.] Wizards cannot die while 5 or more players are alive, and register as the Demon. The evil Wizard gains starting information as if they were the starting Demon.
If a Wizard dies, their team loses.

A Wizard can make any number of wishes. Once a Wizard makes a wish, they cannot make another one until the start of the next Day. Wizards are safe from wishes they do not make. The effects of a wish are removed at the start of every Day.
